runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.84) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing fifth and beaten 6 lengths. Box stats strong with two wins and two placings from four starts. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

runners.formComment: Well supported last time and rocketed out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but had to settle for the minor money, finishing a one length second (20.14) over 350m at Grafton. Should be right in the finish.

runners.formComment: Had been racing in honest fashion, recording three placings in a row, before finishing fifth (20.33) at Grafton last start. Aided by a low draw but will need to find best.

runners.formComment: Quickly away at this track two runs back then again settled forward and finished third at this track last start over 411m. The form from her last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.
